entity.summary: Kava concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange integrated with the HARD ecosystem, providing spot token swaps and current on-chain trading activity.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies HARD Swap as a Kava CLMM DEX and reports substantial current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. The dedicated first-party swap URL is linked from the current protocol registry but could not be fully fetched during this review pass, so HEI uses live_unverified URL status.

evidence.title: HARD Swap official application
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party swap endpoint is linked from the current protocol registry, but the application could not be fully fetched during this review pass, so URL status remains live_unverified.

evidence.title: HARD Swap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies HARD Swap as a Kava CLMM DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: HARD Swap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies HARD Swap as a Kava decentralized exchange and corroborates the exchange identity.
